    www/gitea: Update 1.22.2 → 1.22.3 (fixes security vulnerability)

    Changelog:
    https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/releases/tag/v1.22.3

    `su -m` cause checking authorized_keys in wrong place - replace it with `su`.

    PR:     281949 281264
    MFH:    2024Q4
